title: BREAKING: US Government BANNED Mythos and Fable
summary: The US government issued an export control directive forcing Anthropic to disable Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5 for all customers immediately. The announcement references an official communication from Anthropic regarding the access restrictions.
writeup: The video reports a US government export control directive that requires Anthropic to immediately disable Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5 for all customers, citing an official communication from Anthropic about the access restrictions. It matters because export controls reaching directly into deployed model availability would set a precedent for how regulation can force providers to cut off specific models. The key takeaways: the restriction is framed as government-mandated rather than a provider choice, it applies across the entire customer base, and it takes effect immediately.
